AboutBanner.title: Purity's Story
AboutBanner.description: Skincare that begins with intention and ends with trust—crafted gently, honestly, and with purpose in every drop.

OurVision.title: Glow with Confidence
OurVision.description: Our clean formulas are designed to nourish, restore, and reveal your skin's natural glow—so confidence feels as effortless and radiant as true, timeless beauty itself.
OurVision.body: Every formula is intentional—gentle, effective, and thoughtful. From sourcing to packaging, nothing is rushed. We believe beauty should be personal, responsible, and timeless—crafted by design, not by trend.

badges.crueltyFreeDesc: We're cruelty-free, always and forever, because we believe compassion is the true beauty.
badges.parabenFreeDesc: Products paraben-free, always and forever, because we believe in clean, safe beauty for all.
badges.earthDesc: Our commitment to the planet is present in every step of our product's journey and process.

slides.title: 10,000 Strong

slides.title: Beyond Borders
slides.desc: We grew into global markets with a commitment to clean, sustainable beauty.

Quote.text: Each of our products is a harmony of science, nature, and artistry — redefining what modern beauty truly means.
Quote.author: Ava Collins / CEO and Founder

PromoGrids.leftDesc: We believe beauty isn't shaped by trends, but by truth—how it feels, how it's made, and why it matters. Every formula is led by care, crafted with purpose, and grounded in deep respect for your skin and the planet.
PromoGrids.rightDesc: We believe beauty should never come at the cost of compassion. That's why every formula is 100% cruelty-free—carefully crafted without testing, without harm, and without compromise.

cards.title: Sustainable by Design
cards.description: Designed with sustainability in mind, using clean formulas, ethical sourcing, and recyclable packaging to care for both skin and planet.

cards.title: Universal Adaptability
cards.description: Developed to work across all skin types, delivering targeted care that adapts, protects, and promotes visible balance and healthy radiance.

cards.title: Ultra Gentle Care
cards.description: Formulated to be clean and ultra gentle, rebalancing the skin barrier, soothing, hydrating, and revitalizing all skin types with lasting comfort.

shipping.title: Free Shipping
shipping.desc: Enjoy free worldwide shipping and returns, with customs and duties taxes included.

moneyBack.title: 100—Day Money Back
moneyBack.desc: Free returns within 100 days, please ensure the product is not damaged.

support.title: Support Online
support.desc: We support customers 24/7, send questions we will solve for you immediately.

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: Our orders typically arrive within 3–7 business days, depending on your location and chosen shipping method. Please note that holidays, weather conditions and peak shopping seasons can affect delivery times.

items.question: Can I change my shipping address?
items.answer: Yes, you can update your shipping address within 24 hours of placing your order by contacting our support team directly via email or phone.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can use it on our website or the carrier's site to follow your delivery in real time.

items.question: Do you offer international shipping?
items.answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries. International delivery typically takes 7–14 business days depending on your location and local customs processing.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused, in their original packaging, and in the same condition you received them.

items.question: How do I start a return?
items.answer: Contact our support team with your order number and reason for return. We'll send you a prepaid return label and instructions within 1–2 business days.

items.question: When will I receive my refund?
items.answer: Once we receive and inspect your return, refunds are processed within 5–7 business days back to your original payment method.

items.question: Can I exchange a product?
items.answer: Yes, exchanges are available for a different size or shade. Simply initiate a return and place a new order, or contact support for assistance.

items.question: Are your products cruelty-free?
items.answer: Yes, all Purity products are 100% cruelty-free. We never test on animals at any stage of production, and we only partner with suppliers who share the same values.

items.question: Are the products suitable for sensitive skin?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our formulas are dermatologist-tested and designed with sensitive skin in mind — free from harsh chemicals, parabens, and synthetic fragrances.

items.question: Where can I find the full ingredient list?
items.answer: The full ingredient list for each product is available on its individual product page. You can also find it printed on the product packaging.

items.question: Are your products vegan?
items.answer: The majority of our products are vegan. Each product page clearly indicates whether it is vegan-certified. We are continuously working to expand our vegan range.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay.

items.question: Can I cancel or modify my order?
items.answer: Orders can be cancelled or modified within 1 hour of placement. After that, they enter processing and can no longer be changed. Please contact us immediately if you need to make changes.

items.question: Is my payment information secure?
items.answer: Yes. All transactions are encrypted with SSL technology. We do not store your card details — payments are processed securely through our certified payment providers.

items.question: Do you offer discounts or promo codes?
items.answer: Yes! Subscribe to our newsletter for 10% off your first order. We also run seasonal promotions — follow us on social media to stay updated.

items.question: Do I need an account to place an order?
items.answer: No, you can check out as a guest. However, creating an account lets you track orders, save addresses, and access your order history easily.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page and enter your email address. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

items.question: How is my personal data used?
items.answer: We use your data only to process orders and improve your shopping experience. We never sell your data to third parties. Read our full Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: How do I delete my account?
items.answer: You can request account deletion by contacting our support team. We'll process your request within 7 business days in accordance with applicable data protection laws.
